sqlMap.select: select to_char(id) id, serialNo, util_user.getMemCodeByMemId(sendUser) sendUserNo, util_user.getMemberNameByMemId(sendUser) memberName, to_char(sendDate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') sendDate, sendUser, sendDept, noticeType, sendState, noticeMembers, noticeDepts, noticeTitle, noticeContent, confirmContent, remark, noticeFile, noticeAccounts, removeMembers from vm_managenotice where id = #id#

select distinct to_char(id) id, to_char(org_department_id) org_department_id from org_member where ( 1=0
org_account_id in ($noticeAccounts$)
org_department_id in ($noticeDepts$)
id in ($noticeMembers$)
)
id not in ($removeMembers$)
and is_admin=0 and is_internal=1 and type <> 2 and is_virtual=0 and is_deleted=0 and state = 1 and id not in (select noticeMember from vm_wf_managenotice where sendSerialNo = #sendSerialNo# and noticeMember is not null)
select noticeMember from vm_wf_managenotice where sendSerialNo = #sendSerialNo#

select to_char(id) as "id", serialNo as "serialNo", sendUser as "sendUser", sendDept as "sendDept", sendDate as "sendDate", noticeFile as "noticeFile", noticeTitle as "noticeTitle", noticeContent as "noticeContent", noticeType as "noticeType", confirmContent as "confirmContent", noticeMember as "noticeMember", noticeDept as "noticeDept", sendSerialNo as "sendSerialNo", uniqueCheckNo as "uniqueCheckNo", confirmSelected as "confirmSelected" from vm_wf_managenotice where sendSerialNo = #sendSerialNo#
sqlMap.update: update vm_managenotice_send set notConfirmMembers = #notConfirmMembers#, confirmedMembers = #confirmedMembers# where noticeDept = #deptId# and formmain_id = #formmainId#
sqlMap.select: select noticeDept,notConfirmMembers from vm_managenotice_send where formmain_id = #formId#
sqlMap.update: update vm_managenotice_send set notConfirmMembers = #notConfirmMembers# where noticeDept = #noticeDept# and formmain_id = #formmain_id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_managenotice_send ( id, formmain_id, noticeDept, notConfirmMembers ) values ( #id#, #formmain_id#, #noticeDept#, #notConfirmMembers# )
sqlMap.delete: delete from vm_managenotice_send where noticeDept is null
sqlMap.select: SELECT id, title, push_status, prompt_personnel, prompt_department, prompt_company, remove_personnel, prompt_text, serial_number FROM vm_managerNoteCap4Push where id = #formId#

select distinct to_char(id) id, to_char(org_department_id) org_department_id from org_member where ( 1=0
org_account_id in ($prompt_company$)
org_department_id in ($prompt_department$)
id in ($prompt_personnel$)
)
id not in ($remove_personnel$)
and is_admin=0 and is_internal=1 and type <> 2 and is_virtual=0 and is_deleted=0 and state = 1 and id not in (select noticeMember from vm_wf_managenoteCap4 where sendSerialNo = #serial_number# and noticeMember is not null)

select distinct to_char(orp.objective0_id) id, to_char(ou.id) org_department_id from org_unit ou left join org_relationship orp on ou.id = orp.source_id where ou.id in ($prompt_department$)
orp.objective0_id not in ($remove_personnel$)
and orp.type = 'BusinessDepartment_Member' and orp.objective0_id is not null and orp.objective0_id not in (select noticeMember from vm_wf_managenoteCap4 where sendSerialNo = #serial_number# and noticeMember is not null)
sqlMap.delete: delete from vm_managerNoteCap4PushMemberInfos where departId is null
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_managerNoteCap4PushMemberInfos ( id, formmain_id, departId, unconfirmed_personnel ) values ( util_common.getID, #id#, #departId#, #unconfirmed_personnel# )
sqlMap.select: select unconfirmed_personnel, to_char(departId) as departId from vm_managerNoteCap4PushMemberInfos where formmain_id = #id#
sqlMap.update: update vm_managerNoteCap4PushMemberInfos set unconfirmed_personnel = #unconfirmed_personnel# where formmain_id = #id# and departId = #departId#
sqlMap.select: select to_char(noticeMember) AS noticeMember, to_char(noticeDepart) as noticedepart, to_char(imConfig) as imConfig from vm_wf_managenoteCap4 where sendSerialNo = #sendSerialNo#
sqlMap.update: update vm_managerNoteCap4PushMemberInfos set unconfirmed_personnel = #unconfirmed_personnel#, confirmed_personnel = #confirmed_personnel# where departId = #departId# and formmain_id = #formmainId#
